scripts.emulate:functions: GLIDE_LOGS_APP='rIeUzfTQpgK4ComVOanX' GLIDE_LOGS_TABLE='native-table-EXf6OrHFQHS6x7kVCQ10' LOCAL_API_KEY='Sausages2025!!' firebase emulators:start --project flair-pdf-generator --only functions
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting,functions,firestore:rules,storage --project flair-pdf-generator
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting --project flair-pdf-generator
scripts.deploy:capcomv2: cd CapCom-v2-app && npm run predeploy && npm run build && cd .. && firebase deploy --only hosting:capcom-react-lab --project flair-pdf-generator
scripts.preversion: echo "❌ Don't run 'npm version' in the repo root. Use 'npm run version:functions -- <patch|minor|major>'" && exit 1
